title: FDA Gear spring inventory refresh
excerpt: Expanded in-stock bouffant, hairnet, and apparel cases with lot-coded traceability for SQF and USDA audits.

data.headline: FDA Gear spring inventory refresh
data.subheadline: More case-quantity SKUs in stock for food processors and regulated environments.

data.html:
We refreshed West Chicago inventory across our FDA Gear line — bouffants, hairnets, and food-safe apparel — to support spring production schedules and audit cycles.

Every case remains lot-coded for traceability, with documentation available for vendor qualification packages upon request.

What this means for buyers

  • Faster fulfillment on high-volume head and body protection SKUs
  • Published case pricing visible on product pages
  • Same-day shipping on in-stock orders placed before cutoff

Need a formal quote for procurement approval? Contact our sales team or browse the FDA Gear collection.

title: In-stock cases ship within one business day
excerpt: A reminder for procurement teams: published lead times and Midwest fulfillment from our West Chicago warehouse.

data.headline: In-stock cases ship within one business day
data.subheadline: Reliable fulfillment when your line cannot wait on PPE.

data.html:
ESM Products ships in-stock case orders within one business day from West Chicago, IL. Midwest and Great Lakes customers typically see shorter transit times from our regional hub.

Custom and made-to-order SKUs display transparent lead times on product pages and at checkout. First-time business accounts may require prepayment until credit terms are established.

Questions about a specific SKU or delivery window? Call 630-915-4569 or use our contact form.

title: ESM Products remains WBE certified
excerpt: Supporting diversity spend programs for healthcare, food processing, and industrial procurement teams.

data.headline: Certified women-owned supplier
data.subheadline: Helping procurement teams meet diversity and ESG goals without compromising quality.

data.html:
ESM Products is proud to remain a certified women-owned business (WBE), supplying disposable PPE to operations teams nationwide since 1998.

We partner with buyers who need reliable stock, transparent case pricing, and documentation for vendor qualification — including diversity spend reporting where applicable.

Learn more about our story on the About page or speak with sales about account setup.
